mapper.select: select case when a.dsyf is not null then a.dsyf else '合计' end as dsyf, sum(a.rkjf) as rkjf, sum(a.tkjf) as tkjf, sum(a.ygfcjf) as ygfcjf, sum(a.yfcjf) as yfcjf, sum(a.wfcjf) as wfcjf, sum(a.szfc) as szfc, sum(a.znj) as znj, sum(a.qzfc) as qzfc, sum(a.hj) as hj from fyfcqk a where 1=1 group by a.dsyf with rollup

select case when a.dsyf is not null then a.dsyf else '合计' end as dsyf, sum(a.rkjf) as rkjf, sum(a.tkjf) as tkjf, sum(a.ygfcjf) as ygfcjf, sum(a.yfcjf) as yfcjf, sum(a.wfcjf) as wfcjf, sum(a.szfc) as szfc, sum(a.znj) as znj, sum(a.qzfc) as qzfc, sum(a.hj) as hj from fyfcqk a where dsyf between #{beginRkrq} and #{endRkrq} group by a.dsyf with rollup
